flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Agnes Scott College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0k → 836).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Agnes Scott College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.2k → $50.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Agnes Scott College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.2k → $50.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Agnes Scott College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
